review_title: Great value for money and invaluable insights
author: David W.
pros: Screaming Frog has been an invaluable tool for our site migrations. The information it captured pre and post migration and the ability to compare crawls gave us the confidence that everything had moved across as planned. It is easy to use and we use it regularly to monitor our websites. When we've had queries the response from their team has always been instant.
cons: There are no major cons with Screaming Frog based on my experience using the tool. There are new uses popping up all the time and for the price I've got no complaints.

review_title: SEO made easy with this tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love using screaming frog seo because i need to analyse different website. I am not an technician bit this tools is very cool to obtain all information you need. no technical skill needed
cons: old fashioned website and sometimes not very clear in the presentation of items

review_title: It works, mostly
description: Needed to identify thousands of pages linked across 13 websites. I thought it did that, but later found a lot missed. Not sure if that is the software or my use of it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: On the surface it seems easy. Point at a domain and you get a list back. So easy to use and get what you need. I think. But see cons...
cons: I didn't always feel like this was crawling every page. Maybe it is a config issue, because the interface can be confusing. Yearly license fees make it not attractive.

review_title: One of the best, cost-effective SEO technical tools
description: Overall this is one of the best, most cost effective and reliable tools that SEOs should have in their arsenal. Its been around for a long time and I can see it being used well into the future.
author: Angus A.
pros: Screaming frog is a no fuss platform which makes it easy to do audits and find technical issues on your site that can affect your seo. It's probably one of the most essential tools anyone should have in their SEO tool stack. I like the fact it runs as a desktop app over an online one - while it uses lots of system resources it is responsive and not hindered by online loading times like web based tools. The UI is relatively clean albeit a little cluttered, but you get used to it quickly.
cons: The UI could be improved slightly. There are some similar tools like Sitebulb that are more intuitive and give more in depth suggestions on how to fix technical issues. Screaming frog just presents the issues rather than telling you how to fix them.

review_title: Best Value for Product in This Space
description: When looking for an option to assess client sites, I need SEO software that works consistently and without bugs. It's also helpful that it's affordable compared to the other services offering a similar scraping of SEO data from a website. Given that it's a flat annual fee, I find that far superior to the high monthly costs. And as noted, it just works. If you're an SEO professional, there will be no real learning curve to use it.
author: Shannon O.
pros: The software works exactly how it's intended to work, and the layout is intuitive. Once you've assessed a website, the output of links, metadata, word counts, and headers is all dead simple to understand—and even more, it's dead simple to sort the details as needed.
cons: I wouldn't say that the interface is either attractive or sophisticated. It's looked exactly the same for many, many years. It's not flashy, but it easily displays the data you need, so it's a small compromise that you don't even really notice.

review_title: Best Tool for Crawling; Tech SEO Must-Have
description: - works exactly as advertised - best crawl tool on the market; multiple crawl setting to test security and site structures - precise reporting and native download of data - Sitemap management tool works well; very useful for larger site management with over 5K pages/types
author: Kevin M.
pros: - easy to use and configure - reliable output of detailed lists of errors, issues, and optimization ideas - segmented reporting allows experienced users to zero in on specific issues - Sitemap.xml tool is top-notch and solves issues for large site implementations
cons: - the interface looks dated; learning curve to know where to find different views and data - needs to up updated regularly (not really a con -- users need to adapt) - limited documentation in the tool (need to consult the website for Knowledgebase)

review_title: Such a useful software for SEO
description: I really love this software, all in one solution for seo.
author: Bijendra Y.
pros: I mostly use screaming frog for checking url 200 ok and generation xml sitemap. screaming frog provide full site checkup for seo.
cons: I really like Xml site map generator feature for seo uses.

review_title: The Gold Standard Of SEO Crawl Tools
description: Screaming Frog is definitely the best crawl tool out there. It has comprehensive crawls and lets you export the data to use it in multiple ways.
author: Shawn L.
pros: Comprehensive crawl tool with a huge amount of capabilities.
cons: The user interface may look a little dated, but it's very functional.

review_title: Best value tool on the market - Its true!
description: Easy to use from the first start with a strong learning curve. In fact often saved us a ton of work!
author: Patrick G.
pros: Excellent Tool, which we use already for years. Good price for value relation! We use it for various Use Case and the constant updates with new feature make screaming frog to a fix part in our processes
cons: Nothing in fact. I cant think of a negative thing.

review_title: A longtime fan of ScreamingFrog
description: I use it for URL analysis of all sorts, redirects, meta content, images, all that stuff. Somehow the fact that it's not in the cloud makes it even better in terms of usability.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love ScreamingFrog, super powerful tool, sold at a fair price point, and although the fundamentals stay the same, it keeps improving at each new version.
cons: Back in the days my machine would crash when crawling large sites, but that hasn't been an issue in a very long time.

review_title: Screaming frog review
description: I use it everyday for checking errors on our website and for areas to optimise and improve. It's also essential during the site migration process
author: Ryan B.
pros: It's quick, it's a daily tool without credit limits like some cloud based alternatives. information is easily exported and it caters for everyone from beginner to advanced users
cons: Would be the perfect tool if it was cloud based to save on memory

review_title: Screaming frog - best crawling tool
author: Melisa A.
pros: Easy to use, good connectors, does not crash and give you cool functionalities
cons: sometimes data with GSC is skewed or not matching

review_title: Great value, rock solid SEO tool
description: Overall the tool is excellent, great value for a crawler than is very intuitive and will produce a starting point for any SEO strategy. No rival tool really compares for that price point. Any SEO should strongly consider a purchase.
author: Christopher C.
pros: Screaming frog is extremely simple to use. Simply provide the URL to begin crawling from and the software will provide a full report of issues the website may be facing from meta data to errant redirects. The layout is simple to follow and the language used to title issues is very accessible.
cons: The software is not ideally suited to very large websites (like ecommerce sites for example), the bigger the website the slower the crawl setting needs to be to avoid errors or pages not crawled, but this can be very slow to produce a report.

review_title: Great SEO audit tool
description: It has been great.For 99.9% of my clients, it works like a charm.I can uncover broken links and other SEO issues.It does a great job on the page speed.I love the API integrations.
author: Matthew S.
pros: It works great to uncover any potential SEO issues with a website.I have used it with large and small sites - works amazing. Clear reports.Easy to use.
cons: It does not have the key word rank tracking and back link tracking that some of the more expensive tools have. No big deal.I wish it did local SEO

review_title: The Standard in Web Crawling Software and MUST have for SEO
description: I've used it for personal use (free version) and for work (paid version) as both a content manager and general marketer. Primary use was technical seo checks on live and staging sites as well as occasional competitor research.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: In short, it can do nearly anything! And best of all, the only real limit is your creativity. For example, while launching a series of localized websites in other versions of English (UK, AU, NZ) I used it's regex function to crawl our staging sites for common American spellings that had been missed (e.g. color/colour) There's TONS of support online and neat ideas for using it. Plus the latest version can run headless (i.e. via command line) so you can install it on a cloud server to do huge crawls without hogging your own internet connection or RAM. It's a must have for doing technical seo checks of your website.
cons: -Tons of options so not everything is super easy to find, but it's an advanced tool so that's to be expected. -Paid version is a bit expensive for ireggular users -Yearly license model is very annoying. Would prefer a 1 time purchase and then yearly IF you want updates like other software or plugins

review_title: The Best Tool for On Page - Audit
description: It was a good experience with Screaming frog . I have audited hundreds of the website from this tool
author: Mohd Adil K.
pros: The one thing which i like the most is that it is very easy to use, and also the tool audit your website in real time. if you change something today in your website and then audit again in the tool then i can catch that change whatever you did in your website.
cons: The updated are very frequently in tool and there should be at least keyword tracking feature which can make it undefeated in the seo market.

review_title: Essential piece of the SEO Toolkit
description: It's an essential tool for any SEO or web development project administrator.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Fantastic crawling tool, with excellent API access to some of the most frequently used tools for any SEO. Advanced search and extraction features make it all all the more useful for site scraping.
cons: Data exports can be a bit clunky, and Screaming Frog tends to choke on hugely massive crawls, compared to some of the competition.

review_title: The Best SEO Tool
description: I'm really happy with Screaming Frog and will continue to renew my license.
author: Ian K.
pros: This is one of my favorite, go-to SEO tools. I like that I can crawl an entire website (either a customer or competitor) and get a complete picture of on-page SEO. I can find the title tags, meta descriptions, header tags, on-page copy, canonicals, and so much more. With this information I can figure out how well the site is doing with their technical SEO. With many of the new features they've rolled out (duplicate pages, grammar checks, and more) the tool continues to get more and more valuable.
cons: It would be nice if there were a couple options to graphically represent the data in a CSV, but that's more of a "nice to have".

review_title: Greatest tool out there for auditing
description: I've been using Screaming Frog SEO Spider for years now, even before my current position. It has usually been my first step in any SEO audit, because it provides me with a full overview of what's going on.
author: 'Maggie' Jane M.
pros: Speed. Screaming frog has always been very fast at crawling, and the general oversight it gives me is just what I need. When I say general, this doesn't mean that the data isn't in-depth! Large availability even from the free version. I have very rarely felt limited.
cons: The UI is dated, but this is not an issue since the functionality is on-point. I also wish that I didn't have to crawl the entire site each time.

review_title: My experience with Screaming Frog
description: Overall Screaming Frog Seo spider is good to use and i suggest to the marker to use it.
author: Moh S.
pros: So, there is many things that i personaly like to use in screaming frog seo spider, one of then is finding broken URLs and Image Alt text, this is the only tool in my experience that shows CSS, JavaScript, ahref and every type of broken link in the website. Also we can extract the list of URL into excel that makes works more easy.
cons: As such my bad experience with screaming frog seo spider is that the tool is not on cloud. I keed to install it's software in my system that makes work very hard, as sometimes while auditing the website system got hanged and due to which my audit skip, there many other problems that i am facing with the software.

review_title: Must-have Software for serious SEO
author: Heiko T.
pros: That you can crawl pretty fast your own but also competitor websites and get all the relevant on-site insights you need with just a few clicks. A short while ago they also added nice visualization features.
cons: I really cannot say here anything negative, even if you reach out to them when you have a question they are super helpful. Maybe that it will take some time if you are new to the tool, to explore all the features they offer.

review_title: One the best and trustworthy SEO audit tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool never fails to amaze me with its crawling feature and providing the website audit so that we can find broken links, redirects and then optimize the same. Analyzing competitors website with this tool is much easier with Screaming frog.
cons: I would really appreciate if this tool improves it's user interface. Also, it should include other features of SEO also.

review_title: Screaming Frog SEO Spider has hidden gems, just dig for them
description: Once you get the hang of it, Screaming Frog SEO Spider is definitely value for money. Find broken links, technical issues and so much more in one tool.
author: Nathan V.
pros: Although Screaming Frog SEO Spider looks dated when you open the interface, it works like a beast. Functionality that I didn't have in SEO Tools for Excel or other tools are here, so I've got what I need in all my tools with Screaming Frog in my toolkit.
cons: The interface is really old fashioned. You can see it's a tool by developers, for developers. But if it works, it works. Right? Also, some functionality and settings are somewhat cumbersome.

review_title: Best SEO Spider For Your Website
description: But If you can use its data properly, your website will get a huge boost in Google's rankings.
author: Reyad M.
pros: Need to find broken link, Site Visualisations, Review Meta Robots any many more? you need to screamingfrog. this is the best seo spider for your money making website. i love to audit my website with screamingfrog. Because it's show enough data of my website that's i need to improve my website.
cons: I think the newcomers may be a little embarrassed to use it, which happened to me in the first time use.

review_title: Best Crawler for Manual SEO Audit
description: Overall, I am really happy using the tool for conducting SEO audits. It provides 360-degree status of the website health and suggests solutions.
author: Khushbu P.
pros: Screaming Frog is one of the best tools for auditing and crawling the website for finding the technical seo bottlenecks. It is easy to use, simple, yet powerful. There are different aspects to audit your site from using the software that includes technical and non-technical such as content, metadata, redirects, canonicals, etc. Truly useful.It can also be integrated with Google Search Console, Analytics, Semrush, and other tools for more powerful audit and data extraction.Visualization of structure and crawling path is just fab!
cons: It may require a lot of data and sometimes can be sluggish as the whole operation is carried by the software on your pc.
